description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, review, and deploy. In the build stage add a job named build that uses the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 image, runs mvn clean package, and is tagged docker and shared. In the review stage add a job named review that runs on all branches except master, uses ruby:2.3 image, tags docker and shared, executes apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y ruby-dev curl, gem install dpl, echoes the review app name, creates a Heroku app via a curl POST using the $REVIEW_APP_NAME variable, and then deploys with dpl --provider=heroku --app=$REVIEW_APP_NAME --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY. Also add a manual stop_review job in the review stage that stops the Heroku review app using curl DELETE, echoes a message, sets GIT_STRATEGY to none, and runs on manual trigger. In the deploy stage add three jobs: deploy_dev and deploy_staging run only on master, use ruby:2.3 image, tags docker and shared, install ruby-dev, gem install dpl, and deploy to Heroku apps vel-ci-api-dev and vel-ci-api-stg respectively via dpl with $HEROKU_API_KEY; deploy_local runs only on master, is tagged shell-osboxes, is manual, and runs curl -s https://raw.githubusercontent.com/velmuruganvelayutham/shell-scripts/master/deploy.sh | bash -s. Define a variable REVIEW_APP_NAME as $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG-$CI_PROJECT_NAME.
